groups.name: 小作文·开头
items: I am writing to apologize sincerely for ...（道歉）
I am delighted to recommend ... to you.（推荐）
I am writing to express my gratitude for ...（感谢）
I am writing to apply for the position of ...（申请）
On behalf of ..., I would like to invite you to ...（邀请）

groups.name: 小作文·主体
items: The reason for this is that ...（说明原因）
To make up for it, I suggest that ...（补救建议）
There are two reasons why I recommend it. First, ... Second, ...（编号理由）
I would be more than glad to ... if you could ...（提供帮助）

groups.name: 小作文·结尾
items: Once again, please accept my apologies.（再次致歉）
I am looking forward to your early reply.（期待回复）
Thank you for your time and consideration.（感谢收尾）
I am confident that you will find it ...（信心收尾）

groups.name: 大作文·描述图表/现象
items: As is clearly illustrated in the chart, ... climbed steadily from ... to ...（描述上升）
The number of ... has witnessed a dramatic increase over the past ... years.
Nowadays, it has become increasingly common for people to ...（现象引入）
..., doubling / quadrupling within just ... years.（倍数变化）

groups.name: 大作文·分析原因/影响
items: Several factors account for this striking trend. To begin with, ... In addition, ...
There are two compelling reasons. Firstly, ... Secondly, ...
This phenomenon can be attributed to ...（归因）
The impact of ... can hardly be overstated.（强调影响）

groups.name: 大作文·结尾/建议
items: In my view, while ... brings undeniable benefits, we should ...（辩证表态）
Therefore, it is high time that we ...（呼吁行动）
Only by ... can we truly ...（强调唯一途径）
As the saying goes, "...".（名言升华）
